title: Pre-ticket audit: rank-2 staged per-step live Ollama on staged spine
problem: Rank-2 staged spine has mock-fixture proofs through generate-run-report (ticket-190) but no per-step live Ollama fallthrough. Before any rank-2 live LLM implementation, a focused pre-ticket audit must define scope, env gates, and NO-GO boundaries.
acceptance_criteria: Pre-ticket audit documents rank-2 staged spine current state (mock LLM after live ingest).
Audit defines GO/NO-GO for rank-2 per-step live Ollama with env gate recommendations.
Reconcile/report remain deterministic on rank-2 path (no LLM).
Golden pass if audit patches runner/docs only.
non_goals: New fallthrough flags without audit GO.
category: Phase 3 / live LLM / staged spine audit
